rulings.Case Title: GENE LEPORE VS. AC AND S INC et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Hennessy Industries, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:00am, not 9:30am. The court has two motions on calendar that deal with this issue and due to the court¿s schedule the hearings shall be done by 9:45am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD FIELDS VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 11, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant FMC Corporation on behalf of its former Peerless Pump business¿ motion for judgment on the pleadings is off calendar. Defendant was dismissed April 2. = (503/TLJ)
